title: nototriche estipulata
intro: Nototriche estipulata, also known as the "Mexican clover" or "Mexican bird's eye", is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Nototriche estipulata is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and relieving digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Nototriche estipulata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
